title: Delicate Sweet Malaysian Cookies
description: These cookies are a classic Malaysian treat, featuring a delicate balance of sweet and tender flavors, topped with a low-sodium glaze.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, use an electric mixer to cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, followed by the vanilla extract.
Gradually mix in the dry ingredients until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to about 1/4 inch thickness and cut into desired shapes.
Place the cookies on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 18-20 minutes.
Allow the cookies to cool completely on a wire rack.
Drizzle the low-sodium glaze over the cooled cookies.
Serve immediately and store any leftovers in an airtight container.
